title: Linear Attention Architectures: Mechanisms, Trade-offs, and Cross-Layer Routing
innovation_summary: Linear Attention Architectures: Mechanisms, Trade-offs, and Cross-Layer Routing: This paper presents a comparative study of softmax attention and four recent recurrent linear-attention architectures: DeltaNet, Gated DeltaNet, Kimi Delta Attention, and Gated DeltaNet-2.
